calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karishma Patel appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mrs. Patel explained circumstances to support the request for the expense of the spousal property petition to be paid out of the estate and stated that Do Tran is a friend of the decedent who was trying to help. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission. The court will deduct said fees from the surviving spouse's share of the estate.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Continued To Sep-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karishma Patel, Esq., via Zoom, for Stephen Murphrey, Personal Representative.

At the court's query, counsel provides status of the Estate and advises that a petition should be filed shortly. The court reminds counsel that if the Estate is not ready to close by the next calling, the court anticipates the filing of a petition to approve status of Administration.

The subject matter is continued to Sep-11-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.
